source: MLS Spanish test split (speaker 3471, book 1378, utterance 000006)
attribution: V. Pratap, Q. Xu, A. Sriram, G. Synnaeve, R. Collobert. MLS: A Large-Scale Multilingual Dataset for Speech Research. Interspeech 2020.
modifications: Transcoded single .opus file from mls_spanish_opus/test/audio/3471/1378/3471_1378_000006.opus to 16 kHz mono signed-16-bit WAV via ffmpeg -ac 1 -ar 16000 -c:a pcm_s16le. No trimming.
expected_text: Señor, un caudaloso río dividía dos términos de un mismo señorío, y esté vuestra merced atento, porque el caso es de importancia y algo dificultoso.
